panels.title: This Week (tool tokens)
panels.description: Sum of input + output tokens for tool messages since this week's Monday (Europe/Madrid). Excludes assistant text and cache tokens to focus on workflow signal.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens), 0)::bigint AS tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND mc.timestamp >= date_trunc('week', NOW(), 'Europe/Madrid')

panels.title: Last Week (tool tokens)
panels.description: Sum of input + output tokens for tool messages during the previous full ISO week (Mon-Sun, Europe/Madrid).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens), 0)::bigint AS tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND mc.timestamp >= date_trunc('week', NOW(), 'Europe/Madrid') - INTERVAL '7 days' AND mc.timestamp < date_trunc('week', NOW(), 'Europe/Madrid')

panels.title: WoW Change
panels.description: Percentage change of this week's tool tokens vs last week. Positive = consumption rising.

targets.rawSql: WITH this_week AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens), 0)::bigint AS tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND mc.timestamp >= date_trunc('week', NOW(), 'Europe/Madrid')), last_week AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens), 0)::bigint AS tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND mc.timestamp >= date_trunc('week', NOW(), 'Europe/Madrid') - INTERVAL '7 days' AND mc.timestamp < date_trunc('week', NOW(), 'Europe/Madrid')) SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (tw.tokens - lw.tokens) / NULLIF(lw.tokens, 0), 1) AS wow_pct FROM this_week tw, last_week lw

panels.title: 4-Week Avg (tool tokens)
panels.description: Average tool tokens per week over the previous 4 complete weeks (current week excluded). Baseline for spotting unusual weeks.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens), 0) / 4.0)::bigint AS avg_tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND mc.timestamp >= date_trunc('week', NOW(), 'Europe/Madrid') - INTERVAL '28 days' AND mc.timestamp < date_trunc('week', NOW(), 'Europe/Madrid')

panels.title: Tool Tokens per Week
panels.description: Total input + output tokens for tool messages bucketed by ISO week (Europe/Madrid). Cache tokens excluded so the trend reflects actual workflow effort.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('week', mc.timestamp, 'Europe/Madrid') AS time, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens)::bigint AS tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND mc.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Category Mix per Week (absolute)
panels.description: Stacked weekly tokens by archetype. Bar height = total weekly volume; segments show absolute contribution from each category. Use this to compare *volume* shifts across categories.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('week', mc.timestamp, 'Europe/Madrid') AS time, mc.archetype, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens)::bigint AS tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND mc.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Category Mix per Week (share %)
panels.description: Same data as the panel on the left, normalized to 100% per week. Use this to spot *proportion* shifts independent of total volume — e.g., 'this week was relatively more delegation-heavy'.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('week', mc.timestamp, 'Europe/Madrid') AS time, mc.archetype, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens)::bigint AS tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND mc.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Sessions per Dominant Archetype per Week
panels.description: Each (non-subagent) session is labeled by the archetype that contributed the most tool tokens within it. Stacked bars show how many sessions of each archetype happened per week. Reveals shifts in your *kind* of work, not just volume.

targets.rawSql: WITH session_archetype AS (SELECT mc.session_id, mc.archetype, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND mc.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1, 2), session_dominant AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (session_id) session_id, archetype FROM session_archetype ORDER BY session_id, tokens DESC) SELECT date_trunc('week', s.started_at, 'Europe/Madrid') AS time, sd.archetype, COUNT(*)::bigint AS sessions FROM session_dominant sd JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = sd.session_id WHERE s.started_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND s.is_subagent = false GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Avg Tokens per Message by Archetype
panels.description: Weekly average of input + output tokens per individual tool message, partitioned by archetype. Rising lines mean a category's individual invocations are getting heavier (e.g., reading larger files, longer Bash output, more Edit churn).

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('week', mc.timestamp, 'Europe/Madrid') AS time, mc.archetype, ROUND(AVG(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens))::bigint AS avg_tokens FROM messages_classified mc JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND mc.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
